name: joelpt-claude-plugins
description: Joel's private Claude Code plugin marketplace. Index only — each plugin lives in its own joelpt/claude-plugin-<name> repo.

plugins.name: search-rag
plugins.description: Local-first LanceDB RAG over project documentation. Indexes files matched by .search-rag.json globs and serves semantic search to Claude.

plugins.name: tao
plugins.description: Routes reasoning tasks to optimal Claude tier; uses Grok 4.3, OpenAI/GPT, Groq, Codex CLI, and Ollama in parallel for consensus and adversarial challenge modes.

plugins.name: clickup
plugins.description: ClickUp project management via the clickup MCP server: create, search, and update tasks, subtasks, lists, folders, and spaces, plus time tracking, goals, checklists, dependencies, tags, comments, custom fields, views, and webhooks — through individually gateable mcp__clickup__* tools. Direct ClickUp REST API v2 — no license key.

plugins.name: wip
plugins.description: Session-rolling WIP recaps stored under ~/.claude/wip/. Haiku-synthesized capture on Stop / PreCompact / SessionEnd; auto-injects prior session(s) on SessionStart.

plugins.name: the-plan
plugins.description: Long-horizon plan-developing infrastructure with local web UI. Claude tends, refines, and queues proposals — but does not act without approval.

plugins.name: tip-of-the-day
plugins.description: Claude Code intelligence briefing - delivers curated tips about features, plugins, skills, and best practices at session start.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin development skills: hook, command, skill, agent, MCP, settings, structure. Slim wrappers over pinned upstream from anthropics/claude-plugins-public.

plugins.name: academic-research
plugins.description: 13-agent academic research pipeline: literature reviews, systematic reviews, meta-analysis, fact-checking, and Socratic-guided research exploration. Thin wrapper over Imbad0202/academic-research-skills.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Atomic git commits with deterministic, tiered code review pre-flight, enforcing project git rules. Replaces claude-plugins-official commit-commands.

plugins.name: statusline-usage-updater
plugins.description: Nightly auto-calibration of the statusline %w (weekly-quota burn) coefficient by comparing realised 7-day rate-limit utilisation against realised cost-weighted session usage (output 5x input, cache-read 0.1x, 1h-write 2x). The session helper also reports non-idle Claude run-time across the session and its subagents/workflows. Also drives a peak-hour warning glyph.

plugins.name: yolo
plugins.description: Autonomous work mode — /yolo works all pending items (GitHub issues, TODO.md, PLAN.md) sequentially without pausing for decisions, committing as it goes. Tracks tasks in ~/.claude/yolo-progress.json with a live statusline Y:c/r indicator. Self-gating Stop hook, durable task history, and opt-in worktree janitor.

plugins.name: worktree-warden
plugins.description: Enforces worktree-first editing via a PreToolUse gate that blocks main-checkout edits (with a deliberate, time-boxed, per-repo/global opt-out exception), blocks destruction of any dirty or un-landed worktree/branch (raw git worktree remove, rm -rf, git branch -D, ExitWorktree remove), serializes concurrent merges/main-edits and /bumpall via a cooperative per-worktree advisory lock (stale-lease reclaim + one-step force-unlock), captures uncommitted WIP to recoverable bundles and detects externally-removed worktrees across sessions, audits every land/teardown/undo, surfaces a repo's git worktrees and active/stale locks at session start (configurable), and lands chosen ones into the default branch by deterministic rebase + fast-forward with confidence-gated conflict handling and exact-state rollback. Repo-scoped — never looks cross-repo.

plugins.name: semgrep-shared
plugins.description: Shares one semgrep MCP HTTP daemon across every Claude Code session (auto-spawned on SessionStart, reaped when the last claude exits), replacing the per-session stdio MCP that loads semgrep-core-pro (~1.9 GB) N times. Requires a one-time semgrep.dev OAuth login.
